Title: COMMENT ON INDEX
Description: Add or update or remove a comment for an index

Note : By specifying IS NULL or IS '' you remove the comment for the index.
If the index is dropped, the associated comment is also removed. Note : it is not allowed or possible to add comments for indexes of temporary tables in schema "tmp".
See also: CREATE INDEX , DROP INDEX .
Examples:
COMMENT ON INDEX [
schema_name
'.' ]
index_name
IS  { 'comment text' | NULL | '' }
COMMENT ON INDEX mysch.article_id IS 'unique index of id key column of article table'
